summary: All three /vet source files read and analyzed. Files are complete and ready to copy verbatim (no content changes needed). manifest.json needs 3 additions (cslib-vet-agent.md in agents, skill-cslib-vet in skills, vet.md in commands). EXTENSION.md and README.md each need one row in skill-agent mapping and one row in commands table. README.md also needs 3 lines in architecture tree. AskUserQuestion constraint verified: skill allows it, agent explicitly prohibits it. Implementation is 4 phases: copy files, update manifest.json, update EXTENSION.md, update README.md.

artifacts.summary: Full research report: source file analysis, AskUserQuestion constraint verification, manifest.json changes, EXTENSION.md changes, README.md changes, 4-phase implementation plan
